items.title: Final: Mercury 86, Sparks 82. Los Angeles had a shot to tie in the final 20 seconds but Dearica Hamby’s layup rolled unkindly off the rim. The Sparks have lost 5 in a row. They’re 10-16. Alyssa Thomas had 19 points, 15 assists, 11 rebounds for Phoenix. And now the All-Star break.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Slick Watts. Undrafted PG from Xavier LA made SEA in 73 as hustler. Led NBA w/8.1 apg & 3.2 spg in 75-76. Unique player who wore crooked headbands & shaved his dome before it was a thing. After brief peak, was out of NBA by 79 (age 27). RIP Slick.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst

items.title: “I feel great about it,” Kevin Calabro said of his decision to leave Portland. “I was grateful to have one of 30 jobs in the league and work so close to my home in Seattle.
items.author: Joe Freeman
items.body_excerpt:
“I feel great about it,” Kevin Calabro said of his decision to leave Portland. “I was grateful to have one of 30 jobs in the league and work so close to my home in Seattle.

"I’ll always be a part of Blazers history. I made some great memories and some great friends."

items.body_excerpt:
Kevin Calabro tells me has decided to step away from Blazers broadcasting and will no longer call games for Portland.

The team and its veteran play-by-play man had been in discussions on a new contract, but he called the offers "subprime" and he has decided to move on.
